mapper.select: SELECT co.*, p.name AS parent_name FROM course_order co LEFT JOIN parent p ON co.parent_id = p.id ORDER BY co.id
SELECT co.*, p.name AS parent_name FROM course_order co LEFT JOIN parent p ON co.parent_id = p.id WHERE co.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_order (order_no, parent_id, course_id, course_name, teacher_name, hours, fee, status, pay_time) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{parentId}, #{courseId}, #{courseName}, #{teacherName}, #{hours}, #{fee}, #{status}, #{payTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE course_order SET order_no=#{orderNo}, parent_id=#{parentId}, course_id=#{courseId}, course_name=#{courseName}, teacher_name=#{teacherName}, hours=#{hours}, fee=#{fee}, status=#{status}, pay_time=#{payTime} WHERE id = #{id}
